name: Text Viewers
description: Adds live JSON and Markdown viewers to text fields with matching action tags.

authors.name: Günther Rezniczek
authors.institution: St. Elisabethgruppe GmbH - Marien Hospital Herne | Klinikum der Ruhr-Universität Bochum

action-tags.description: Render the field value as formatted JSON below the field on data entry forms and survey pages.
Render Notes field values as Markdown on data entry forms and survey pages. Optional quoted parameters: initial:md, initial:raw, md-only.
Reserved for MD/JSON viewing of uploaded files.

project-settings.name: Output debug information to the browser console
